notableEvents.label: Tristan Peters pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters singles on a ground ball to right fielder Austin Martin. Randal Grichuk to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Colson Montgomery GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Colson Montgomery grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to shortstop Tristan Gray to first baseman Josh Bell. Randal Grichuk out at 2nd. Colson Montgomery out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tristan Peters pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters walks. Edgar Quero to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Chase Meidroth grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Chase Meidroth hits a grand slam (5) to center field. Edgar Quero scores. Tristan Peters scores. Sam Antonacci scores.

notableEvents.label: Tristan Peters pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters singles on a line drive to left fielder Trevor Larnach. Edgar Quero to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Luisangel Acuña GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luisangel Acuña grounds into a double play, shortstop Tristan Gray to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Josh Bell. Edgar Quero scores. Tristan Peters to 3rd. Sam Antonacci out at 2nd. Luisangel Acuña out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luisangel Acuña rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luisangel Acuña grounds into a double play, shortstop Tristan Gray to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Josh Bell. Edgar Quero scores. Tristan Peters to 3rd. Sam Antonacci out at 2nd. Luisangel Acuña out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
